alphaCategories.name: pricing-efficiency
alphaCategories.description: Live bid-ask spreads, midpoints, implied probabilities, and fair-value dislocations across Polymarket CLOB.
alphaCategories.whyAlpha: Free LLMs produce stale or hallucinated probabilities; CLOB /midpoint, /spread, /price expose current tick-level truth.

alphaCategories.name: liquidity-depth
alphaCategories.description: Orderbook depth, slippage estimates, and fillable size.
alphaCategories.whyAlpha: Only way to answer 'can I get $50k filled at 40¢?' is walking the live book.

alphaCategories.name: whale-flow
alphaCategories.whyAlpha: On-chain holder positions surface smart-money conviction.

alphaCategories.name: event-tradability
alphaCategories.description: Ranking outcomes within multi-outcome events by liquidity+spread+volume.
alphaCategories.whyAlpha: Multi-outcome events have dozens of sub-markets with wildly different tradability.

alphaCategories.name: rules-and-resolution
alphaCategories.description: Surfacing exact resolution criteria, UMA oracle, end dates.
alphaCategories.whyAlpha: Resolution ambiguity is the #1 reason bettors get burned.

alphaCategories.name: screening-and-discovery
alphaCategories.description: Programmatic screens across categories, tags, probability bands, end-date windows.
alphaCategories.whyAlpha: Free LLMs cannot enumerate the live Polymarket universe.

alphaCategories.name: parameter-and-microstructure
alphaCategories.description: Tick size, min order size, neg-risk, fees.
alphaCategories.whyAlpha: Required inputs for any real order.

alphaCategories.name: workflow-synthesis
alphaCategories.description: Multi-step pipelines chaining tools into a buyer-grade output.
alphaCategories.whyAlpha: The end deliverable — a tradable memo with live numbers.

Vance, Rand Paul).
